violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned and sanitized at time of inspection, see disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Flies were observed in liquor bottles at the bar. Liquor was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Salsa and dressing were observed expired. Salsa and dressing were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) lobster, labeled keep frozen, was observed thawing with the package intact in the walk-in cooler. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when defrosting. ROP lobster was observed held at 34 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The person in charge removed the lobster from the package at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
